title: Warden Drops
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## The Problem
Since the Warden was added to Minecraft, the only item it dropped was a Sculk block, which was pretty useless. 

## The Solution
With this mod, the Warden has a chance to drop two of the four items: a Mending book, an Unbreaking 3 book, a Netherite Ingot, or a Sharpness 6 Diamond Sword.

![The loot table of this mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab54c2c7d8d01a5699997baa230a4ebab900f4d0.png)
